rationale: Large YApi standardization across 53 files matching the PR body's enumerated items. `vendors/client/api/paths.js` exports `getUserAvatarUrl(uid)` → `${API_PREFIX}/user/avatar?uid=${uid}`, `getProjectDownloadUrl(projectId)`, and `getApiDocPath(path)` (handling leading-slash normalization). `vendors/client/api/plugin.js` exports `fetchAdvMockCaseList(interfaceId)` calling `apiClient.get('/plugin/advmock/case/list', { params: { interface_id: interfaceId } })`. `utils/uploadHelper.js` adds `createBase64UploadRequest` for the Ant Design Upload + apiClient integration. The Profile page is rewired to use `customRequest` plus the new `uploadAvatar` API (replacing the prior `action` direct-upload). `ProjectToken.jsx` and the various components (Header, TimeLine, MemberList, View, ProjectMember, Activity) consume the centralized path constants from `api/paths`. `reducer/modules/mockCol.js` switches to the new `fetchAdvMockCaseList`. The diff also lands sibling API modules (`col.js`, `follow.js`, `group.js`, `index.js`, `interface.js`, `mock.js`, `news.js`, `open.js`, `project.js`, `user.js`, `wiki.js`, etc.) needed for the cross-cutting standardization. `Notify.jsx` is correctly preserved using axios for external version URLs as the body explicitly calls out.
